summary: Frontend-only validation for Dalal Light + Dalal Midnight (Dark) across landing, login, register, forgot/privacy/terms, onboarding, bank-onboarding, dashboard and admin. All 28 acceptance items PASS. Zero JS pageerrors. Webpack compiles cleanly. Theme toggle present on landing nav AND on login/register; clicking flips <html class="dark"> and persists rinkosh_theme in localStorage; theme persists across reload and across route navigation. Visual treatment (Bismuth tiles, amber CTAs, cream text on midnight #050810) confirmed by Playwright screenshots on every page.

issues: Banner still pinned bottom-center on every page including /login, /register, /onboarding. Does not block primary CTAs in test (Sign In, Create Account, Next, Compare loans now all reachable), but visually crowds the Made-with-Emergent badge and the floating chat widget. Consider auto-hiding once user passes login.

critical_code_review_comments: Post-login redirect: admin@rinkosh.com lands on / (landing) rather than /dashboard or /admin. Navbar swaps to authed state (Dashboard + Admin links appear) which works, but UX-wise an admin probably expects to go straight to /admin or /dashboard. Confirm intent in AuthContext post-login redirect logic.

Carry-over from iter 17 still open: [lang="hi"] override for .hero-headline never wins specificity, so Devanagari brand font (IBM Plex Sans Devanagari) is still not actually rendered when Hindi is selected (verified document.fonts shows it unloaded). Not part of this iteration’s scope but still pending.

Dark-mode .bismuth-tile (the hero-preview instance) computes background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0). Visually it renders correctly because .bismuth-tile-best uses a separate amber-halo overlay, but the spec called for #141C2A glass surface on the tile. Confirm whether intended (let pattern show through) or wire a fallback dark surface fill on .bismuth-tile in .dark scope so plain (non-best) tiles still get a visible midnight glass.
Cookie banner is z-index ~50 and shows on every page including auth pages — consider gating it to public marketing routes only.

Carry-over: EmiCalculator and Trust section headers (‘Know your monthly EMI in 30 seconds’, ‘Three promises. Zero exceptions.’, WHY RINKOSH kicker) still English-only when Hindi is selected. Not part of current iteration scope.
test_credentials: admin@rinkosh.com / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — login succeeded, redirected to / with authed nav showing Dashboard + Admin links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Playwright run against preview URL. Verified data points: 1) Landing LIGHT: body bg=rgb(255,251,245) cream, html.class empty, theme-toggle present, hero+compare-btn+emi all render. 2) Landing DARK after toggle: body bg=rgb(5,8,16) #050810, html.class='dark', localStorage.rinkosh_theme='dark', hero-headline color=rgb(255,251,245) cream, amber accent on ‘not just the rate’ visible in screenshot. 3) /browse-loans DARK: 72 product cards render on #050810. 4) /login DARK: 1 theme-toggle, 1 email, 1 password, 1 .bismuth-tile card, Google button text present, Sign In CTA solid amber #FFB347. 5) Toggle on /login flips to LIGHT cream bg=rgb(255,251,245). 6) /register: same Bismuth treatment + name input + dark/light flip works. 7) /forgot-password, /privacy, /terms: dark bg=rgb(5,8,16) confirmed. 8) Admin login→/ landing (authed nav shows Dashboard+Admin+logout). 9) /onboarding, /bank-onboarding, /admin all dark bg=rgb(5,8,16). 10) Theme persists after page reload. 0 JS pageerrors. Screenshots saved under .screenshots/ in playwright session.
rca of the issue: n/a — no blocking bug found this iteration. Two carry-over minor items from iter 17 (Devanagari font specificity, two un-translated section headers) remain but are out of scope for the dark-mode rollout.
